title: BRAZIL Santos Bourbon 1 kg
description: A classic Brazilian Santos Bourbon with a naturally sweet and smooth profile.
Expect notes of milk chocolate, roasted nuts, and a soft caramel finish.
Perfect for espresso lovers who enjoy a creamy, low-acidity cup.

title: BRAZIL Cerrado Fine Cup 500g
description: Cerrado Fine Cup offers a balanced and clean Brazilian flavor experience.
Taste notes include cocoa, almond, and a hint of dried fruit sweetness.
Ideal for both filter brewing and moka pot.

title: BRAZIL Mogiana Dark Roast 250g
description: A bold dark roast from the Mogiana region with a rich, intense character.
Expect dark chocolate, toasted caramel, and a smoky finish.
Perfect for strong espresso and milk-based drinks.

title: KENYA Kirinyaga Peaberry 1 kg
description: Kirinyaga Peaberry is known for its bright acidity and vibrant fruit notes.
Flavors of blackcurrant, citrus zest, and floral undertones dominate the cup.
Excellent for pour-over and light-roast enthusiasts.

title: KENYA Mount Kenya Estate 500g
description: A premium estate coffee with a juicy, wine-like Kenyan profile.
Expect raspberry, grapefruit, and subtle herbal notes.
Perfect for V60, Chemex, and Aeropress.

title: KENYA Nyeri Medium Roast 250g
description: A balanced medium roast from Nyeri with a clean, refreshing finish.
Flavors include red berries, lime, and floral sweetness.
Ideal for manual brewing and everyday filter coffee.

title: COLOMBIA Huila Excelso 1 kg
description: Huila Excelso offers a silky body with a naturally sweet aroma.
Taste notes include caramel, almond, and gentle citrus brightness.
A versatile coffee suitable for both espresso and filter brewing.

title: COLOMBIA Medellin Supremo 500g
description: A smooth and aromatic Colombian coffee with a balanced flavor profile.
Expect cocoa, honey, and soft fruit sweetness.
Perfect for French press and slow morning brews.

title: COLOMBIA Tolima Organic 250g
description: An organic Colombian coffee grown in the Tolima region.
Flavors include caramel, cocoa nibs, and subtle tropical fruit.
Great for eco-conscious coffee lovers who enjoy clean, natural flavors.

title: BRAZIL Yellow Bourbon 1 kg
description: Yellow Bourbon is a premium Brazilian variety known for its sweetness.
Expect honey, hazelnut, and soft chocolate notes.
Perfect for espresso and milk drinks thanks to its creamy body.

title: KENYA AA Plus Premium 500g
description: A high-grade Kenyan AA coffee with exceptional clarity and brightness.
Flavors of blackcurrant, citrus, and floral sweetness.
Ideal for specialty brewing methods.

title: COLOMBIA Narino Specialty 500g
description: A specialty-grade coffee from the high mountains of Nariño.
Expect caramel sweetness, citrus acidity, and a clean finish.
Perfect for pour-over and light-roast fans.
